title: ObjectHandle is Invalid in Microsoft Excel node
symptom: The workflow fails intermittently with 'Error 400: ObjectHandle is Invalid' when appending a row to a table in the Microsoft Excel node.
not_this_if: Error does not occur when using a stable DriveItem ID
root_cause: The error occurs because the internal SharePoint UUID is being used instead of the Microsoft Graph DriveItem ID. The Graph API requires the DriveItem ID to properly identify the file, and using the UUID leads to an invalid resource ID error.
fix_steps: Obtain the Microsoft Graph DriveItem ID for the Excel file
Replace the internal SharePoint UUID with the DriveItem ID in the node configuration
Save the workflow and test the execution
agent_instruction: Use the Microsoft Graph DriveItem ID instead of the SharePoint UUID in the Excel node configuration.
